Research Team Member – Pitt HexAI Research Laboratory
University of Pittsburgh, School of Health and Rehabilitation Sciences
• Collaborating in interdisciplinary artificial intelligence research with a focus on explainable healthcare AI.
• Working alongside faculty, clinical experts, and PhD researchers on AI‑driven projects to improve clinical decision support and model interpretability.
• Contributing to research planning, data analysis, and dissemination of findings in conferences and publications.
• Engaged in laboratory initiatives including the HexAI Podcast and AI research events.
(Position held as a research team member among the international HexAI group)
